svg.metadata: {"_description":"Decision-tree flow with diamond gates: a deployability check.","type":"flow","title":"should i ship?","nodes":[{"id":"start","label":"ready?","kind":"diamond"},{"id":"tests","label":"tests pass?","kind":"diamond"},{"id":"ci","label":"CI green?","kind":"diamond"},{"id":"ship","label":"ship it","kind":"ellipse","accent":"link"},{"id":"wait","label":"fix + retry","kind":"note","background":"highlight"},{"id":"back","label":"rollback plan","kind":"rectangle","accent":"accent"}],"edges":[{"from":"start","to":"tests","label":"yes"},{"from":"tests","to":"ci","label":"yes"},{"from":"tests","to":"wait","label":"no"},{"from":"ci","to":"ship","label":"yes"},{"from":"ci","to":"wait","label":"no"},{"from":"ship","to":"back","label":"and","kind":"dotted"}]}
